zh.lifeSummary: Mary Matilda Tattersall是Richd Tattersall的女兒，於大約1521年出生在英國越可爾哈利法可。她於1542年8月7日與John Ramsden Esq of Longley Hall在英國越可爾哈利法可結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1596年3月2日在英國越可爾卡爾福利享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mary Matilda Tattersall是Richd Tattersall的女儿，于大约1521年出生在英国越可爾哈利法可。她于1542年8月7日与John Ramsden Esq of Longley Hall在英国越可爾哈利法可结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1596年3月2日在英国越可爾卡爾福利享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: Tattersall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and west Yorkshire): habitational name from Tattershall in Lincolnshire, named from the Old English personal name Tāthere (genitive Tātheres) + Old English halh ‘nook, corner of land’.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moira
meanings: Anglicized form of Irish Máire , now used throughout the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: Mary Matilda Tattersall was born about 1521, in Halifax, Yorkshire, England as the daughter of Richd Tattersall. She married John Ramsden Esq of Longley Hall on 7 August 1542, in Halifax, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 2 March 1596, in Calverley, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Mary Matilda Tattersall est née environ 1521, à Halifax, Everwyck, Angleterre, fille de Richd Tattersall. Elle a épousé John Ramsden Esq of Longley Hall le 7 août 1542, à Halifax, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 2 mars 1596, à Calverley, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Mary Matilda Tattersall wurde um 1521 in Halifax, Yorkshire, England, als Tochter von Richd Tattersall geboren. Sie hat am 7. August 1542 in Halifax, Yorkshire, England John Ramsden Esq of Longley Hall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 2. März 1596 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Calverley, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Mary Matilda Tattersall è nata il circa 1521 nel Halifax, Yorkshire, England come figlia di Richd Tattersall. Lei sposato John Ramsden Esq of Longley Hall il 7 agosto 1542, nel Halifax, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 2 marzo 1596, nel Calverley, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Matilda Tattersallは約1521年にイギリスヨークシュアイアハリファックスでRichd Tattersallの娘として生まれた。1542年8月7日にイギリスヨークシュアイアハリファックスでJohn Ramsden Esq of Longley Hallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1596年3月2日にイギリスヨークシュアイアカルバーリーで76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Matilda Tattersall(은)는 대략 1521년 영국 요르크실르 할이파스에서 Richd Tattersall의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1542년 8월 7일 영국 요르크실르 할이파스에서 John Ramsden Esq of Longley Hall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1596년 3월 2일 영국 요르크실르 캘벌리에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mary Matilda Tattersall nasceu aproximadamente 1521, em Halifax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra filha de Richd Tattersall. Ela casou-se com John Ramsden Esq of Longley Hall em 7 de agosto de 1542, em Halifax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 2 de março de 1596, em Calverley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Mary Matilda Tattersall родилась около 1521 г. в местности хэлифакс, еркшир, Англия. Её отца звали Richd Tattersall. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Ramsden Esq of Longley Hall 7 августа 1542 г. в местности хэлифакс, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 2 марта 1596 г. в местности калвирли, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Mary Matilda Tattersall nació aproximadamente 1521, en Halifax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra como hija de Richd Tattersall. Se casó con John Ramsden Esq of Longley Hall el 7 de agosto de 1542, en Halifax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 2 de marzo de 1596, en Calverley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 76 años.
